5 - Section 3.mp4
Welcome to section three. I am super excited. This is my favorite, favorite, favorite section because I'm introducing the one page attack and conquer plan. Look at this badass pirate on the screen behind me here. Listen, the one page attack and conquer plan is your guide, is your daily battle plan on one page on how you scale and position your company for an exit. So let's get into it. Before we get started in this section, this is the biggest download of the entire workshop. It's called the OPACP, right? The acronym, One Page Attack and Conquer Plan. Download that dude right now. The example is the one I'm actually having up here. This is a combination of a template and actually some snippets from one of my former digital agencies.
Feel free to use some of this, get inspired by it, tweak it. This is a Word document, and it's a template, so you need to customize it. So change— you know, I have Company X here. That would obviously be your company. But this whole thing, we're going to fill out through this workshop. And this is going to be something that can potentially be a game changer for your organization. So let's go over it. All right. So if you haven't downloaded it, download it now. Get it in front of you. Because we're gonna fill this out as we go. All right, so the OPACP, the one sheet that will allow you to operate and scale your business. So in this quadrant, this is the order we're actually going to fill this out in.
This market leader positioning— who you are, who, what, and why. Right. Which who you are, what you do, what proof do you have and why people want it? We're going to get into all of that on how to position you as the market leader. We're going to have everybody in your organization understanding this right now. If I'd walk into your company and I asked everybody. Who you are, what do you do, what proof do you have, and why people want it, everybody would give me a different answer. That's a problem, right? This is going to clearly identify who you are, what you do, what proof you have, and why people want it. The second piece. Again, niche will get you rich. What is the tagline? You need to have immediate impact.
Whatever your company name is, underneath it, you've got to be clear and direct on what you do. Right. This is a matter of nanoseconds to communicate that. So we're going to hone in on that niche tagline. The second is going to be this quadrant, this right quadrant, goals and actions. I'm going to teach you how to build out growth goals, profitability goals, and macro-level company goals. Then we're going to actually break that down into quarterly objectives. What are the dates on those objectives? Who are the owners? Who's the most qualified to own it? How do you track it? How do you measure it? Getting so excited just talking about it. The next piece is the growth core values. Again, I use this word 'growth' because we're not talking about just a flat company.
We want to see people skyrocketing. Right. These core values. This is the behaviors and the actions that empower your team and benefit your clients. We're going to map out four core values and we're going to. Talk about, you know, how they're applicable to your team members. How are you empowering them? How do you hire and fire people against them? And how do they benefit your clients? They become a selling tool. So you're not always just competing on speed, service, and time. Then, once we formulate that, we're going to roll this all into what is the purpose, right? Not some pie in the sky bullshit, but a clear mission statement that you stand behind that your team members and your clients buy into. And then I'm going to show you in this all-day, every-day section. This is the framework that allows you to. and hold people accountable, right? Again, this one-page plan, when done effectively, this is your battle map. This is your daily attack and conquer to success.
